tasks.label: Debug SendEmail
tasks.command: sam build -t min.yaml SendEmail && sam local invoke -t .aws-sam/build/template.yaml SendEmail --event events/sendEmail.json -d 5678 --debugger-path ${workspaceFolder}/.debugger --debug-args '/tmp/lambci_debug_files/debugpy --listen 0.0.0.0:5678 --wait-for-client' --container-host-interface 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: Debug UpdateWeeklyResults
tasks.command: sam build -t min.yaml UpdateWeeklyResultsPython && sam local invoke -t .aws-sam/build/template.yaml UpdateWeeklyResultsPython --event events/updateWeeklyResults.json -d 5678 --debugger-path ${workspaceFolder}/.debugger --debug-args '/tmp/lambci_debug_files/debugpy --listen 0.0.0.0:5678 --wait-for-client' --container-host-interface 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: Debug GetFBPUserEmailAndDisplayName
tasks.command: sam build -t min.yaml GetFBPEmailAndDisplayName && sam local invoke -t .aws-sam/build/template.yaml GetFBPEmailAndDisplayName --event events/getFBPEmailAndDisplayName.json -d 5678 --debugger-path ${workspaceFolder}/.debugger --debug-args '/tmp/lambci_debug_files/debugpy --listen 0.0.0.0:5678 --wait-for-client' --container-host-interface 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: Debug GetListForEmail
tasks.command: sam build -t min.yaml GetListForEmail && sam local invoke -t .aws-sam/build/template.yaml GetListForEmail --event events/getListForEmail.json -d 5678 --debugger-path ${workspaceFolder}/.debugger --debug-args '/tmp/lambci_debug_files/debugpy --listen 0.0.0.0:5678 --wait-for-client' --container-host-interface 0.0.0.0

tasks.label: Cleanup
tasks.command: lsof -ti tcp:5678 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; docker rm -f $(docker ps -aq) 2>/dev/null || true
